assumptions.fourPilotHeuristic: Pattern treated as 4 pilot when any non-PAX, non-deadhead sector duty exceeds 12:00. If that occurs, qualifying night includes all operating sectors except SYD/AKL and AKL/SYD, plus SYD/PER and PER/SYD on LHR patterns and BNE/PER plus PER/BNE on LHR patterns.
assumptions.governedDeltaRule: Effective delta is governed as max(Applicable Credit, Flight Total + Deadhead Total + qualifying Night/3).
